title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She raised her three children on her own.
example.secondSentence: She (1) _________ her three children on her own.

questions.firstSentence: They will announce the winner at noon.
It was wrong of him to speak like that.
The ladder was too short to reach the roof.
questions.secondSentence: The ladder wasn't (1) _________ to reach the roof.

questions.firstSentence: She finally succeeded in finding a new flat.
The doctor said to her, 'Stop eating fast food.'
He started working at this company five years ago.
questions.secondSentence: He has been working at this company (1) _________ years.
